TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_tadakidemu_nu_imelang, title = tadakidemu_nu_imelang, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/tadakidemu_nu_imelang} }

S.FORM: == tadakidemu nu imelang Ťā•ŤÉĖÁóá == imi ŚģöÁĺ© kidemu atu BMIa kanki: kawiliay u matatungusay " BMI mikisaba tu tulim", teban tadaba'ket tu "BMI tu laa'd tulim katukuh tusiw", kawanan u kidemuay tu "BMI mikikakatu tusep", u kin/pin-fun-kun-ce.30 Ťā•ŤÉĖŚíĆBMIÁöĄťóúšŅā:Ś∑¶Áāļś≠£Śłł(BMIŚįŹśĖľ25),šł≠ÁāļťĀéťáć(BMI (BMIŚ§ßśĖľ30),ŚĖģšĹćÁāļŚÖ¨śĖ§/ŚĻ≥śĖĻŚÖ¨Śįļ. micidekay tu ku kidemu nu tatamaan, u BMI u sippic a kg/m2: ba'ket 146 kg, talakaw 177 kunfun, kidemuay u tada mauputu ku simal sa milalid ku la'cus nu udipan. sayaway a imian u ditek tu udipan ku daditekan:6, nikudan sa cunusan tu nu dumaan, patinaku u tatelecan menah atu duma nu balucuan a culil nu idangan a sakabalihenawan a imelang:14. BMI atu simal atu pulung nu simalan idaw namin ku kankian. nu wawaan a ba'ket caay kalecad ku tatama atu tatayna atu mihcaan caay tu kalecad, u mahiniay a sipakayda i sakalecad nu mihcaan a wawaan a milaheci. Sakamusa, nu wawa atu masakapahay a kidemu nu imian u BMI mikikaka tu 95% nuydaan a mihcaan. sipakayda i wawaan atu masakapahay nikakidemuan sa nu cudadan namakayda i 1963 mihcaan katukuh i 1994 mihcaan, sisa nai' henay ku nu aydaay a nikalecadan tu ba'ket a tapabaw. šłÄšĹćŚöīťáćťĀéŤÉĖÁöĄÁĒ∑śÄß,ŚÖ∂BMIÁāļ 47 kg/m2: , :14.BMI BMIťęėśĖľ95 . kya kidemu a zitayŤā•ŤÉĖÁóáÁôľÁĒüÁöĄśôāśúü nika udipan nu tademaw, idaw ku tuluay a mihcaan nu kidemuan, babenis han : lutungay, masasiningay, masabalakiay. lutungay itida henay i bili nuyna atu nilecuhan tu a lutungay, tada malakuuyd tu ku nikanan nu ina, atu nipakanan tu buling, nikalalidan tu lutungay a simal tada yadah tu. siningan u tada cacelakan a nikatalakawan, nika talakawan pacumud tu ukaka a mulangaw pacumud tu sasimalan patahtah tu sakay hecian atu ukakan a mucelak. mahaymaw tu ku culil nu yiyu, caaytu ka yadah ku nilekakawan, sakay nikaudip kapah tu tadakapah tu ku nika, sisa kimulmul sat uku tateleca, masimal tu namin ku udiudipan, sisa siukak mawada t uku heci nu kidemu (OSO). 108 283 tadaba'ked tu atu yadah ku adadaay a sakalecad nu kanki, pasu balucuay a imelang, sakatusa nu siidangay a isi'an, masela' a makemet tu nikasu'tan nu hahanhanan, atu nu dumaan a nganangan, kansicu, atu mahachac, nu mahiniayaca nu imelangan, mikikiw sakamusa u kidemuay a nikaudip aapuyu' namin ku nikaudip. . sakaimelangŤáīÁóÖśÄß u kidemuay a yadah ku namaka udipay atu balucuay a imelang mitalakaw tu balihenawan, imelang atu kidemau a nikapulungan nu kankian sakaytini i sapaculil i udipan. sapaculil i udipan pasusakatusa a siisi'ay nu wanengan, talakaw nu idangan, talakaw i idng ku simal, u idnag ku tuluay nu masasimalay i udip. . kidemau nu kapulungan a imelang hakiya namakaydaay tu i nikakidemuan, hatu u kidemu idaw ku sakalecad nu sasakamuen: patinaku caayay ka kapah ku nikan atu samuhmuh sa mueneng.kinemu atu sakacaay kalecad nu imelangan nu nikacaayan kalecad nu icelangan, mahida u sakatusa nu siwanengay a isi' nu imelangan atu tadakidemau tu, 64% nu tatami a siwanengay nu isi'a imelangan atu 77% a tataynaan nu siwanengay nu isi' a imelangan malecad idaw namin ku masaupuay nu simalan ,siwa. sakamusa ku katuuday nu sye-ce saan tada yadahtu ku micumuday atu samuhmuh sananay a maudip sisa kidemu satu. adidi' ku sananay, tada yadah tu ku nikan atu siawulan, namakaudipay atu balucuay, idaw ku namakalalangawan a sakacaay kalecad atu nikulian a nikasilaculan. . siawulan hananay ťĀļŚā≥Śõ†Áī† sakalecad nu imelang, kidemau u daduducan atu hekalay anisakakawawan a nikasilahecian. hatanengen ku nikan atu sakatahekal nu ci-in pabalucu' tu tademaw i nikanan sikidemuay hakiya. .
S.PHON: == tadakid…ômu nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč *** == imi ** kid…ômu atu bmia kanki: kawir~…ĺiaj u matatuŇčusaj " bmi mikisaba tu tur~…ĺim", t…ôban tadaba Ē~ °k…ôt tu "bmi tu r~…ĺaa Ē~ °d tur~…ĺim katukuńß tusiw", kawanan u kid…ômuaj tu "bmi mikikakatu tus…ôp", u kin/pin-fun-kun- ¶…ô.** ***bmi***:****(bmi****),****(bmi (bmi****),*****/****. mi ¶id…ôkaj tu ku kid…ômu nu tatamaan, u bmi u sippi ¶ a kg/m*: ba Ē~ °k…ôt *** kg, tar~…ĺakaw *** kunfun, kid…ômuaj u tada mauputu ku simar~…ĺ sa mir~…ĺar~…ĺid ku r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us nu udipan. sajawaj a imian u dit…ôk tu udipan ku dadit…ôkan:*, nikudan sa ¶unusan tu nu dumaan, patinaku u tat…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶an m…ônańß atu duma nu bar~…ĺu ¶uan a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ nu idaŇčan a sakabar~…ĺińß…ônawan a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč:**. bmi atu simar~…ĺ atu pur~…ĺuŇč nu simar~…ĺan idaw namin ku kankian. nu wawaan a ba Ē~ °k…ôt ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku tatama atu tatajna atu mińß ¶aan ¶aaj tu kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, u mańßiniaj a sipakajda i sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu mińß ¶aan a wawaan a mir~…ĺańß…ô ¶i. sakamusa, nu wawa atu masakapańßaj a kid…ômu nu imian u bmi mikikaka tu **% nujdaan a mińß ¶aan. sipakajda i wawaan atu masakapańßaj nikakid…ômuan sa nu ¶udadan namakajda i **** mińß ¶aan katukuńß i **** mińß ¶aan, sisa nai Ē~ ° ńß…ônaj ku nu ajdaaj a nikar~…ĺ…ô ¶adan tu ba Ē~ °k…ôt a tapabaw. *********,*bmi* ** kg/m*: , :**.bmi bmi**** . kja kid…ômu a zitaj******** nika udipan nu tad…ômaw, idaw ku tur~…ĺuaj a mińß ¶aan nu kid…ômuan, bab…ônis ńßan : r~…ĺutuŇčaj, masasiniŇčaj, masabar~…ĺakiaj. r~…ĺutuŇčaj itida ńß…ônaj i bir~…ĺi nujna atu nir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan tu a r~…ĺutuŇčaj, tada mar~…ĺakuujd tu ku nikanan nu ina, atu nipakanan tu bur~…ĺiŇč, nikar~…ĺar~…ĺidan tu r~…ĺutuŇčaj a simar~…ĺ tada jadańß tu. siniŇčan u tada ¶a ¶…ôr~…ĺakan a nikatar~…ĺakawan, nika tar~…ĺakawan pa ¶umud tu ukaka a mur~…ĺaŇčaw pa ¶umud tu sasimar~…ĺan patańßtańß tu sakaj ńß…ô ¶ian atu ukakan a mu ¶…ôr~…ĺak. mańßajmaw tu ku ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ nu jiju, ¶aajtu ka jadańß ku nir~…ĺ…ôkakawan, sakaj nikaudip kapańß tu tadakapańß tu ku nika, sisa kimur~…ĺmur~…ĺ sat uku tat…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶a, masimar~…ĺ tu namin ku udiudipan, sisa siukak mawada t uku ńß…ô ¶i nu kid…ômu (oso). *** *** tadaba Ē~ °k…ôd tu atu jadańß ku adadaaj a sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu kanki, pasu bar~…ĺu ¶uaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, sakatusa nu siidaŇčaj a isi Ē~ °an, mas…ôr~…ĺa Ē~ ° a mak…ôm…ôt tu nikasu Ē~ °tan nu ńßańßanńßanan, atu nu dumaan a ŇčanaŇčan, kansi ¶u, atu mańßa ¶ńßa ¶, nu mańßiniaja ¶a nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan, mikikiw sakamusa u kid…ômuaj a nikaudip aapuju Ē~ ° namin ku nikaudip. . sakaim…ôr~…ĺaŇč*** u kid…ômuaj a jadańß ku namaka udipaj atu bar~…ĺu ¶uaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč mitar~…ĺakaw tu bar~…ĺińß…ônawan, im…ôr~…ĺaŇč atu kid…ômau a nikapur~…ĺuŇčan nu kankian sakajtini i sapa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ i udipan. sapa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ i udipan pasusakatusa a siisi Ē~ °aj nu wan…ôŇčan, tar~…ĺakaw nu idaŇčan, tar~…ĺakaw i idŇč ku simar~…ĺ, u idnag ku tur~…ĺuaj nu masasimar~…ĺaj i udip. . kid…ômau nu kapur~…ĺuŇčan a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč ńßakija namakajdaaj tu i nikakid…ômuan, ńßatu u kid…ômu idaw ku sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu sasakamu…ôn: patinaku ¶aajaj ka kapańß ku nikan atu samuńßmuńß sa mu…ôn…ôŇč.kin…ômu atu saka ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan nu nika ¶aajan kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčan, mańßida u sakatusa nu siwan…ôŇčaj a isi Ē~ ° nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan atu tadakid…ômau tu, **% nu tatami a siwan…ôŇčaj nu isi Ē~ °a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan atu **% a tatajnaan nu siwan…ôŇčaj nu isi Ē~ ° a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad idaw namin ku masaupuaj nu simar~…ĺan ,siwa. sakamusa ku katuudaj nu sj…ô- ¶…ô saan tada jadańßtu ku mi ¶umudaj atu samuńßmuńß sananaj a maudip sisa kid…ômu satu. adidi Ē~ ° ku sananaj, tada jadańß tu ku nikan atu siawur~…ĺan, namakaudipaj atu bar~…ĺu ¶uaj, idaw ku namakar~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a saka ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad atu nikur~…ĺian a nikasir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan. . siawur~…ĺan ńßananaj **** sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, kid…ômau u dadudu ¶an atu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj anisakakawawan a nikasir~…ĺańß…ô ¶ian. ńßatan…ôŇč…ôn ku nikan atu sakatańß…ôkar~…ĺ nu ¶i-in pabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° tu tad…ômaw i nikanan sikid…ômuaj ńßakija. .
S.FORM: == tadakidemu nu imelang Ťā•ŤÉĖÁóá == imi ŚģöÁĺ© kidemu atu BMIa kanki: kawiliay u matatungusay " BMI mikisaba tu tulim", teban tadaba'ket tu "BMI tu laa'd tulim katukuh tusiw", kawanan u kidemuay tu "BMI mikikakatu tusep", u kin/pin-fun-kun-ce.30 Ťā•ŤÉĖŚíĆBMIÁöĄťóúšŅā:Ś∑¶Áāļś≠£Śłł(BMIŚįŹśĖľ25),šł≠ÁāļťĀéťáć(BMI (BMIŚ§ßśĖľ30),ŚĖģšĹćÁāļŚÖ¨śĖ§/ŚĻ≥śĖĻŚÖ¨Śįļ. micidekay tu ku kidemu nu tatamaan, u BMI u sippic a kg/m2: ba'ket 146 kg, talakaw 177 kunfun, kidemuay u tada mauputu ku simal sa milalid ku la'cus nu udipan. sayaway a imian u ditek tu udipan ku daditekan:6, nikudan sa cunusan tu nu dumaan, patinaku u tatelecan menah atu duma nu balucuan a culil nu idangan a sakabalihenawan a imelang:14. BMI atu simal atu pulung nu simalan idaw namin ku kankian. nu wawaan a ba'ket caay kalecad ku tatama atu tatayna atu mihcaan caay tu kalecad, u mahiniay a sipakayda i sakalecad nu mihcaan a wawaan a milaheci. Sakamusa, nu wawa atu masakapahay a kidemu nu imian u BMI mikikaka tu 95% nuydaan a mihcaan. sipakayda i wawaan atu masakapahay nikakidemuan sa nu cudadan namakayda i 1963 mihcaan katukuh i 1994 mihcaan, sisa nai' henay ku nu aydaay a nikalecadan tu ba'ket a tapabaw. šłÄšĹćŚöīťáćťĀéŤÉĖÁöĄÁĒ∑śÄß,ŚÖ∂BMIÁāļ 47 kg/m2: , :14.BMI BMIťęėśĖľ95 . kya kidemu a zitayŤā•ŤÉĖÁóáÁôľÁĒüÁöĄśôāśúü nika udipan nu tademaw, idaw ku tuluay a mihcaan nu kidemuan, babenis han : lutungay, masasiningay, masabalakiay. lutungay itida henay i bili nuyna atu nilecuhan tu a lutungay, tada malakuuyd tu ku nikanan nu ina, atu nipakanan tu buling, nikalalidan tu lutungay a simal tada yadah tu. siningan u tada cacelakan a nikatalakawan, nika talakawan pacumud tu ukaka a mulangaw pacumud tu sasimalan patahtah tu sakay hecian atu ukakan a mucelak. mahaymaw tu ku culil nu yiyu, caaytu ka yadah ku nilekakawan, sakay nikaudip kapah tu tadakapah tu ku nika, sisa kimulmul sat uku tateleca, masimal tu namin ku udiudipan, sisa siukak mawada t uku heci nu kidemu (OSO). 108 283 tadaba'ked tu atu yadah ku adadaay a sakalecad nu kanki, pasu balucuay a imelang, sakatusa nu siidangay a isi'an, masela' a makemet tu nikasu'tan nu hahanhanan, atu nu dumaan a nganangan, kansicu, atu mahachac, nu mahiniayaca nu imelangan, mikikiw sakamusa u kidemuay a nikaudip aapuyu' namin ku nikaudip. . sakaimelangŤáīÁóÖśÄß u kidemuay a yadah ku namaka udipay atu balucuay a imelang mitalakaw tu balihenawan, imelang atu kidemau a nikapulungan nu kankian sakaytini i sapaculil i udipan. sapaculil i udipan pasusakatusa a siisi'ay nu wanengan, talakaw nu idangan, talakaw i idng ku simal, u idnag ku tuluay nu masasimalay i udip. . kidemau nu kapulungan a imelang hakiya namakaydaay tu i nikakidemuan, hatu u kidemu idaw ku sakalecad nu sasakamuen: patinaku caayay ka kapah ku nikan atu samuhmuh sa mueneng.kinemu atu sakacaay kalecad nu imelangan nu nikacaayan kalecad nu icelangan, mahida u sakatusa nu siwanengay a isi' nu imelangan atu tadakidemau tu, 64% nu tatami a siwanengay nu isi'a imelangan atu 77% a tataynaan nu siwanengay nu isi' a imelangan malecad idaw namin ku masaupuay nu simalan ,siwa. sakamusa ku katuuday nu sye-ce saan tada yadahtu ku micumuday atu samuhmuh sananay a maudip sisa kidemu satu. adidi' ku sananay, tada yadah tu ku nikan atu siawulan, namakaudipay atu balucuay, idaw ku namakalalangawan a sakacaay kalecad atu nikulian a nikasilaculan. . siawulan hananay ťĀļŚā≥Śõ†Áī† sakalecad nu imelang, kidemau u daduducan atu hekalay anisakakawawan a nikasilahecian. hatanengen ku nikan atu sakatahekal nu ci-in pabalucu' tu tademaw i nikanan sikidemuay hakiya. .
S.PHON: == tadakid…ômu nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč *** == imi ** kid…ômu atu bmia kanki: kawir~…ĺiaj u matatuŇčusaj " bmi mikisaba tu tur~…ĺim", t…ôban tadaba Ē~ °k…ôt tu "bmi tu r~…ĺaa Ē~ °d tur~…ĺim katukuńß tusiw", kawanan u kid…ômuaj tu "bmi mikikakatu tus…ôp", u kin/pin-fun-kun- ¶…ô.** ***bmi***:****(bmi****),****(bmi (bmi****),*****/****. mi ¶id…ôkaj tu ku kid…ômu nu tatamaan, u bmi u sippi ¶ a kg/m*: ba Ē~ °k…ôt *** kg, tar~…ĺakaw *** kunfun, kid…ômuaj u tada mauputu ku simar~…ĺ sa mir~…ĺar~…ĺid ku r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us nu udipan. sajawaj a imian u dit…ôk tu udipan ku dadit…ôkan:*, nikudan sa ¶unusan tu nu dumaan, patinaku u tat…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶an m…ônańß atu duma nu bar~…ĺu ¶uan a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ nu idaŇčan a sakabar~…ĺińß…ônawan a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč:**. bmi atu simar~…ĺ atu pur~…ĺuŇč nu simar~…ĺan idaw namin ku nu wawa atu masakapańßaj a kid…ômu nu imian u bmi mikikaka tu **% nujdaan a mińß ¶aan. sipakajda i wawaan atu masakapańßaj nikakid…ômuan sa nu ¶udadan namakajda i **** mińß ¶aan katukuńß i **** mińß ¶aan, sisa nai Ē~ ° ńß…ônaj ku nu ajdaaj a nikar~…ĺ…ô ¶adan tu ba Ē~ °k…ôt a tapabaw. *********,*bmi* ** kg/m*: , :**.bmi bmi**** . kja kid…ômu a zitaj******** nika udipan nu tad…ômaw, idaw ku tur~…ĺuaj a mińß ¶aan nu kid…ômuan, bab…ônis ńßan : r~…ĺutuŇčaj, masasiniŇčaj, masabar~…ĺakiaj. r~…ĺutuŇčaj itida ńß…ônaj i bir~…ĺi nujna atu nir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan tu a r~…ĺutuŇčaj, tada mar~…ĺakuujd tu ku nikanan nu ina, atu nipakanan tu bur~…ĺiŇč, nikar~…ĺar~…ĺidan tu r~…ĺutuŇčaj a simar~…ĺ tada jadańß tu. siniŇčan u tada ¶a ¶…ôr~…ĺakan a nikatar~…ĺakawan, nika tar~…ĺakawan pa ¶umud tu ukaka a mur~…ĺaŇčaw pa ¶umud tu sasimar~…ĺan patańßtańß tu sakaj ńß…ô ¶ian atu ukakan a mu ¶…ôr~…ĺak. mańßajmaw tu ku ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ nu jiju, ¶aajtu ka jadańß ku nir~…ĺ…ôkakawan, sakaj nikaudip kapańß tu tadakapańß tu ku nika, sisa kimur~…ĺmur~…ĺ sat uku tat…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶a, masimar~…ĺ tu namin ku udiudipan, sisa siukak mawada t uku ńß…ô ¶i nu kid…ômu (oso). *** *** tadaba Ē~ °k…ôd tu atu jadańß ku adadaaj a sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu kanki, pasu bar~…ĺu ¶uaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, sakatusa nu siidaŇčaj a isi Ē~ °an, mas…ôr~…ĺa Ē~ ° a mak…ôm…ôt tu nikasu Ē~ °tan nu ńßańßanńßanan, atu nu dumaan a ŇčanaŇčan, kansi ¶u, atu mańßa ¶ńßa ¶, nu mańßiniaja ¶a nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan, mikikiw sakamusa u kid…ômuaj a nikaudip aapuju Ē~ ° namin ku nikaudip. . sakaim…ôr~…ĺaŇč*** u kid…ômuaj a jadańß ku namaka udipaj atu bar~…ĺu ¶uaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč mitar~…ĺakaw tu bar~…ĺińß…ônawan, im…ôr~…ĺaŇč atu kid…ômau a nikapur~…ĺuŇčan nu kankian sakajtini i sapa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ i udipan. sapa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ i udipan pasusakatusa a siisi Ē~ °aj nu wan…ôŇčan, tar~…ĺakaw nu idaŇčan, tar~…ĺakaw i idŇč ku simar~…ĺ, u idnag ku tur~…ĺuaj nu masasimar~…ĺaj i udip. . kid…ômau nu kapur~…ĺuŇčan a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč ńßakija namakajdaaj tu i nikakid…ômuan, ńßatu u kid…ômu idaw ku sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu sasakamu…ôn: patinaku ¶aajaj ka kapańß ku nikan atu samuńßmuńß sa mu…ôn…ôŇč.kin…ômu atu saka ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan nu nika ¶aajan kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčan, mańßida u sakatusa nu siwan…ôŇčaj a isi Ē~ ° nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan atu tadakid…ômau tu, **% nu tatami a siwan…ôŇčaj nu isi Ē~ °a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan atu **% a tatajnaan nu siwan…ôŇčaj nu isi Ē~ ° a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad idaw namin ku masaupuaj nu simar~…ĺan ,siwa. sakamusa ku katuudaj nu sj…ô- ¶…ô saan tada jadańßtu ku mi ¶umudaj atu samuńßmuńß sananaj a maudip sisa kid…ômu satu. adidi Ē~ ° ku sananaj, tada jadańß tu ku nikan atu siawur~…ĺan, namakaudipaj atu bar~…ĺu ¶uaj, idaw ku namakar~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a saka ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad atu nikur~…ĺian a nikasir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan. . siawur~…ĺan ńßananaj **** sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, kid…ômau u dadudu ¶an atu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj anisakakawawan a nikasir~…ĺańß…ô ¶ian. ńßatan…ôŇč…ôn ku nikan atu sakatańß…ôkar~…ĺ nu ¶i-in pabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° tu tad…ômaw i nikanan sikid…ômuaj ńßakija. .
